prestazioni: Engine swap to a **BP-ZE (RS) 1.8L DOHC 16V** from the Mazda MX-5 NB (BP-series), retaining the original **FS-ZE** transmission but upgrading to a **PPG short-shift kit** with **Quaife ATB differential** for improved power delivery. Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) on a **custom tubular manifold** by **Toda Racing**, paired with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve**.

Full **Toda Racing BP-series engine build**: **Forged Mahle pistons** (8.5:1 CR), **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, **Toda Racing Stage 3 camshafts** (272° duration, 11.0mm lift), **Ferrea 5000-series valves**, **Toda Racing valve springs/retainers**, and **ARP head studs**. Fuel system upgraded with **ID1000x injectors**, **Walbro 255LPH fuel pump**, and **AEM 320LPH in-tank pump**, controlled via **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor**.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valving for BP-chassis geometry), **SuperPro poly bushings** (full rear subframe, control arms, and sway bar mounts), **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar** (24mm), and **Cusco front strut bar**. Braking upgraded to **AP Racing 4-piston calipers** (front, 330mm rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, **Brembo 2-piston rear calipers**, and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**. Wheels: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** (16x8 +35 ET, 5x114.3) with **Yokohama Advan A052** (225/45/16) tires.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 323F-specific widebody kit** (fiberglass, bolt-on fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon carbon hood**), paired with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 1200mm span) and **custom aluminum rear diffuser** by **AutoTechnik**. Full **PPF (Paint Protection Film)** in **XPEL Stealth** with **3M Gloss Black vinyl** accents on roof, mirrors, and lower rocker panels.

**Recaro SP-G (JDM-spec)** front seats with **Takata Drift II harnesses**, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub** (Momo Prototipo wheel), and **Defi BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, water temp) mounted in a **custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod**. Interior stripped of rear seats, sound deadening removed, and **custom aluminum floor panels** installed with **Wilwood brake bias adjuster** and **HydraForce hydraulic handbrake**.

**Hella Micro DE fog lights** (clear lens, 55W H3 bulbs) integrated into the front bumper, **Osram Night Breaker Laser headlights** (H7 bulbs), and **custom LED taillight conversion** using **Luxx Hella-style LED strips** with **Dapper Lighting sequential turn signals**. Full **debadging** except for **Mazdaspeed JDM-style rear emblem** (red/black) and **BP-ZE engine bay plaque** by **JDM Stickers**.
